title: Similar or Not — Watch Meaning Become Geometry
tagline: Type a handful of sentences and see them embed, cluster on a 2D map, and light up a cosine-similarity heatmap — an embeddings playground running 100% in your browser.
description: In-browser embeddings playground: cosine-similarity heatmap + live 2D PCA map of any sentences, powered by transformers.js. Day 5 of kb-daily-builds.
